name: split-error-non-string-subject
expect:
!{
  :origin :qlang/eval
  :kind :type-error
  :thrown :SplitSubjectNotString
  :message "split expects String at position 1, got number"
  :operand "split"
  :position 1
  :expectedType "String"
  :actualType :number
  :actualValue 42
  :fault {:step `split(",")` :input 42}
  :trail null
}

name: split-error-vec-subject
expect:
!{
  :origin :qlang/eval
  :kind :type-error
  :thrown :SplitSubjectNotString
  :message "split expects String at position 1, got vec"
  :operand "split"
  :position 1
  :expectedType "String"
  :actualType :vec
  :actualValue [1 2]
  :fault {
    :step `split(",")`
    :input [1 2]
  }
  :trail null
}

name: split-error-null-subject
expect:
!{
  :origin :qlang/eval
  :kind :type-error
  :thrown :SplitSubjectNotString
  :message "split expects String at position 1, got null"
  :operand "split"
  :position 1
  :expectedType "String"
  :actualType :null
  :actualValue null
  :fault {:step `split(",")` :input null}
  :trail null
}

name: split-error-non-string-separator
expect:
!{
  :origin :qlang/eval
  :kind :type-error
  :thrown :SplitSeparatorNotString
  :message "split expects String at position 2, got number"
  :operand "split"
  :position 2
  :expectedType "String"
  :actualType :number
  :actualValue 42
  :fault {:step `split(42)` :input "abc"}
  :trail null
}

name: split-error-keyword-separator
expect:
!{
  :origin :qlang/eval
  :kind :type-error
  :thrown :SplitSeparatorNotString
  :message "split expects String at position 2, got keyword"
  :operand "split"
  :position 2
  :expectedType "String"
  :actualType :keyword
  :actualValue :foo
  :fault {:step `split(:foo)` :input "abc"}
  :trail null
}

name: split-error-vec-separator
expect:
!{
  :origin :qlang/eval
  :kind :type-error
  :thrown :SplitSeparatorNotString
  :message "split expects String at position 2, got vec"
  :operand "split"
  :position 2
  :expectedType "String"
  :actualType :vec
  :actualValue []
  :fault {:step `split([])` :input "abc"}
  :trail null
}
